'''''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 3''', also labeled '''"The Rebel Opposition, Chapter 3"''', is the third issue in the ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron]]'' series of comics. It was released on [[September 26]], [[1995]] by [[Dark Horse Comics]].

==Publisher's summary==
''Tycho Celchu has infiltrated the Imperial Forces. Now he can communicate vital strategic information that will give the Rebellion an upper hand! But when he's pressed to lead a raid on his old Rogue Squadron teammates, he must choose between saving his comrades and serving the cause.''

==Plot summary==
After having convinced an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] garrison on [[Cilpar]] he is an Imperial pilot, [[Tycho Celchu/Legends|Tycho Celchu]] flies with [[Crimson Squadron]] in a mission against his [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] comrades. Celchu uses low frequencies to transmit instructions to his [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]], who launches Celchu's [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-Wing]] into the air. 

The Alliance and Cilpari rebels have made the ancient [[Cilpar native temple|temple]] into a supply depot. [[Dllr Nep]] warns the rebels of something incoming, but it is simply Celchu's X-Wing, which the rebels take as a sign to leave. As Celchu's X-Wing engages the TIEs, [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]], [[Elscol Loro]] and [[Groznik]] fend off TIEs. Celchu's X-Wing takes down multiple TIEs, including [[Wing Commander/Legends|Wing Commander]] [[Grode]], eventually taking down Celchu's own TIE just as Celchu ejects. 

Celchu's X-Wing lands in the Cilpari forest and [[Winter Celchu|Winter]] emerges from it. Reuniting with [[Wes Janson/Legends|Wes Janson]], Winter explains that she was inside the X-Wing when it took off. At [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron's]] base, Antilles tells Elscol that he received a message from "Targeter" with her location and the rebels agree to send [[Vance Rego]] to meet with "Targeter". 

Celchu navigates the Cilpari forest at night to come upon the Imperial supply base at the ancient [[Cilpar native temple|temple]]. Rego arrives and dispels the [[Ronk/Legends|ronks]] with the [[Oratay/Legends|oratay]] disc, leaving in a speeder before Celchu can catch up. Celchu reflects on Winter, who reminds him of his fiancée Mia, who died on [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] while Celchu served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]. 

Rego finds the cave with Winter and Janson inside, and Winter presents herself as Princess Leia. Believing her ruse, Rego confronts her with a group of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]], asking Winter to hand him her [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]].
